# compare.rfmix_paint { #tspaint.compare.rfmix_paint }

```python
tspaint.compare.rfmix_paint(
    ts,
    labels,
    queries,
    K=2,
    *,
    recombination_rate=1e-08,
    generations=30.0,
    mutation_rate=4e-07,
    seed=1,
    rfmix_bin=None,
    extra_args=None,
)
```

RFMix painter with the standard ``painter(ts, labels, queries)`` signature.

Adds mutations if ``ts`` has none (the true-ARG substrate), runs RFMix, and
returns the ``.fb.tsv`` posteriors as per-haplotype Segment tracks — so RFMix
scores through the same :func:`tspaint.compare.score_painter` harness.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**ts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Tree sequence; mutations are added if it has none.

<code>[**labels**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Map from reference sample-node id to ancestry state.

<code>[**queries**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[iterable](`iterable`)\[[int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Sample-node ids of the admixed query haplotypes.

<code>[**K**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [2]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of ancestry states (default 2).

<code>[**recombination_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1e-08]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Per-base recombination rate (default ``1e-8``).

<code>[**generations**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [30.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   RFMix's ``-G``, generations since admixture — known from the sim's ``T_admix`` (default ``30.0``).

<code>[**mutation_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [4e-07]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Mutation rate used if ``ts`` lacks sites (default ``4e-7``).

<code>[**seed**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Random seed for the mutation simulation (default 1).

<code>[**rfmix_bin**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Path to the ``rfmix`` binary (default: ``DEFAULT_RFMIX`` / ``TSPAINT_RFMIX``).

<code>[**extra_args**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[iterable](`iterable`)\[[str](`str`)\]]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Additional command-line arguments appended to the RFMix invocation.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[Segment](`tspaint.output.Segment`)\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``{query_node: [Segment]}`` from the ``.fb.tsv`` per-marker posteriors.
